      noProxy: '.westpac.co.nz,.westpactrust.co.nz,deterraformstateuat.blob.core.windows.net'
      clientId: $(DE_D365_client_id)
      clientSecret: $(DE_D365_client_secret)
      dediaSftpPrivateKey: $(DEDIASFTPPrivateKey)

      noProxy: '.westpac.co.nz,.westpactrust.co.nz,deterraformstateprod.blob.core.windows.net'
      clientId: $(DE_D365_client_id)
      clientSecret: $(DE_D365_client_secret)
      dediaSftpPrivateKey: $(DEDIASFTPPrivateKey)
